message:
feat(net): enhance async networking with socket2 integration

DNS (cache, lookup, resolver):
- Improve DNS caching and resolution
- Better async resolver implementation

TCP (listener, socket, stream):
- Enhanced TCP listener with socket2 options
- Improved socket configuration
- Better stream handling with cancel-safety

UDP:
- Improved datagram socket implementation

Unix (listener, stream):
- Better Unix domain socket support

mod.rs:
- Updated module organization

These changes leverage the new socket2 dependency for advanced socket
configuration while maintaining asupersync's cancel-correctness guarantees.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
